episodes.title: Why it Matters: Epstein files put Wexner in spotlight
episodes.description:
Ohio billionaire Les Wexner was deposed this week by the House Oversight Committee at his Ohio mansion, following the release of new Jeffrey Epstein files.

For more Local News from WTVG: https://www.13abc.com/
For more YouTube Content: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCx0ik6bylKpDo64bVGBtPrg

episodes.title: Billionaire Les Wexner says he was ‘duped’ by adviser Jeffrey Epstein, ‘a world-class con man’
